text.title: SSL/TLS Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: TLS 1.3 + Modern profile + HSTS preload + Let's Encrypt
mTLS via mesh + internal CA + auto-rotate every 24h
TLS 1.2 fallback + documented justification + sunset plan
skip-this-methodology — use snakeoil cert; do not productionize

example.note: Endpoint scope? → matches branch "scope == public_web_or_api" → conclusion ref=r1-tls13-default
